outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources maintains full exposure to the Permian Basin with stable drilling activity, showing 15 active sites at decision date and a positive relative activity delta of +2.2, driven by three newly active pads. With WTI averaging around $60.84 and realized prices at a 8% discount, production levels support a deterministic revenue forecast near $976M for Q4 2024. The high share of continuously active sites (12 of 15) indicates operational consistency, suggesting reliable production throughput into quarter-end.
